tools.name: list
tools.description: List all Blueprint assets in the project

tools.name: blueprint
tools.description: Get detailed info about a Blueprint (variables, graphs, components)

tools.name: graph
tools.description: Get all nodes and connections in a Blueprint graph

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search for nodes across all Blueprints by keyword

tools.name: references
tools.description: Find all references to a Blueprint asset

tools.name: listClasses
tools.description: List available UClasses filtered by parent class

parameters.name: parentClass
parameters.description: Parent class to filter by (e.g. Actor, Pawn)

tools.name: listFunctions
tools.description: List callable functions for a given class or Blueprint

tools.name: listProperties
tools.description: List properties/variables for a given class or Blueprint

tools.name: getPinInfo
tools.description: Get detailed pin info for a specific node

tools.name: addNode
tools.description: Add a node to a Blueprint graph

parameters.name: nodeType
parameters.description: Node type (e.g. CallFunction, Event, CustomEvent, VariableGet, VariableSet, IfThenElse, Sequence, DynamicCast, MacroInstance, BreakStruct, MakeStruct, Knot, Comment)

tools.name: deleteNode
tools.description: Delete a node from a Blueprint graph

tools.name: connectPins
tools.description: Connect two pins between nodes in a Blueprint graph

tools.name: disconnectPin
tools.description: Disconnect all connections from a pin

tools.name: setPinDefault
tools.description: Set the default value of a pin

tools.name: moveNode
tools.description: Move a node to a new position in the graph

tools.name: refreshAllNodes
tools.description: Refresh all nodes in a Blueprint (reconstructs pins)

tools.name: createBlueprint
tools.description: Create a new Blueprint asset

tools.name: createGraph
tools.description: Create a new function graph in a Blueprint

parameters.name: graphType
parameters.description: Graph type: function or macro (default: function)

tools.name: deleteGraph
tools.description: Delete a graph from a Blueprint

tools.name: addVariable
tools.description: Add a variable to a Blueprint

parameters.name: variableType
parameters.description: Variable type (e.g. float, int, bool, string, Vector, Rotator, Transform, or any UClass/UStruct name)

tools.name: removeVariable
tools.description: Remove a variable from a Blueprint

tools.name: compileBlueprint
tools.description: Compile a Blueprint and report errors

tools.name: duplicateNodes
tools.description: Duplicate nodes within a Blueprint graph

parameters.name: nodeGuids
parameters.description: Array of node GUIDs to duplicate

tools.name: setNodeComment
tools.description: Set or update the comment on a node

tools.name: addComponent
tools.description: Add a component to a Blueprint

parameters.name: parentComponent
parameters.description: Parent component name to attach to

tools.name: listActors
tools.description: List all actors in the current level

tools.name: getActor
tools.description: Get detailed info about a specific actor

tools.name: spawnActor
tools.description: Spawn a new actor in the level

parameters.name: className
parameters.description: Actor class to spawn (e.g. StaticMeshActor, PointLight, CameraActor)

tools.name: deleteActor
tools.description: Delete an actor from the level

tools.name: setActorProperty
tools.description: Set a property on an actor

tools.name: setActorTransform
tools.description: Set the transform (location/rotation/scale) of an actor

tools.name: listLevels
tools.description: List all levels/sublevels in the current world

tools.name: loadLevel
tools.description: Load/open a level by name or path

tools.name: removeSublevel
tools.description: Remove a streaming sublevel from the current world

tools.name: getLevelBlueprint
tools.description: Get the level Blueprint for the current or specified level

tools.name: streamingLevelVisibility
tools.description: Set visibility of a streaming sublevel

parameters.name: visible
parameters.description: Whether the sublevel should be visible

tools.name: outputLog
tools.description: Read recent entries from the Output Log

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of log entries to return (default: 50)

tools.name: validateBlueprint
tools.description: Validate a Blueprint for errors without compiling

tools.name: snapshotGraph
tools.description: Take a snapshot of a Blueprint graph for later rollback

tools.name: restoreGraph
tools.description: Restore a Blueprint graph from a previous snapshot

tools.name: sceneSnapshot
tools.description: Get a structured snapshot of all actors in the scene

tools.name: screenshot
tools.description: Capture a viewport screenshot and return as base64 image

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Image format: png or jpeg (default: jpeg)

tools.name: focusActor
tools.description: Focus the viewport camera on a specific actor

tools.name: selectActor
tools.description: Select an actor in the editor

parameters.name: addToSelection
parameters.description: Add to current selection instead of replacing

tools.name: setViewport
tools.description: Set the viewport camera position and orientation

tools.name: waitReady
tools.description: Wait for the editor to be ready (useful after level loads)

tools.name: resolveRef
tools.description: Resolve a short ref ID (e.g. a3) to an actor name

tools.name: moveActor
tools.description: Move an actor by a relative offset or to an absolute position

tools.name: getCamera
tools.description: Get the current viewport camera position and orientation

tools.name: listViewports
tools.description: List all open viewport windows

tools.name: getSelection
tools.description: Get the currently selected actors in the editor

tools.name: listSequences
tools.description: List all Level Sequence assets in the project

tools.name: readSequence
tools.description: Read the tracks and keyframes of a Level Sequence

tools.name: removeAudioTracks
tools.description: Remove audio tracks from a Level Sequence

tools.name: drawDebug
tools.description: Draw debug shapes in the viewport (lines, spheres, boxes)

parameters.name: shapes
parameters.description: Array of shape objects with type, position, color, etc.

tools.name: clearDebug
tools.description: Clear all debug draw shapes

tools.name: blueprintSnapshot
tools.description: Take a full snapshot of a Blueprint including all graphs

tools.name: beginTransaction
tools.description: Begin an undo transaction

tools.name: endTransaction
tools.description: End the current undo transaction

tools.name: undo
tools.description: Undo the last transaction

tools.name: redo
tools.description: Redo the last undone transaction

tools.name: saveState
tools.description: Save the current state of a Blueprint for later diffing

tools.name: diffState
tools.description: Compare current Blueprint state against a saved state

tools.name: restoreState
tools.description: Restore a Blueprint to a previously saved state

tools.name: listStates
tools.description: List all saved Blueprint states

tools.name: executePython
tools.description: Execute Python code or a Python file in the editor

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: Path to a .py file to execute

tools.name: openAsset
tools.description: Open an asset in its default editor

tools.name: rescan
tools.description: Rescan the asset registry for new or changed assets

tools.name: startPIE
tools.description: Start Play-In-Editor session

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: PIE mode: viewport, newWindow, or VR (default: viewport)

tools.name: stopPIE
tools.description: Stop the current Play-In-Editor session

tools.name: pausePIE
tools.description: Pause or resume the Play-In-Editor session

parameters.name: paused
parameters.description: True to pause, false to resume

tools.name: stepPIE
tools.description: Step one frame in a paused PIE session

tools.name: getPIEState
tools.description: Get the current PIE session state

tools.name: executeConsole
tools.description: Execute a console command in the editor

tools.name: getCVar
tools.description: Get the value of a console variable

tools.name: setCVar
tools.description: Set the value of a console variable

tools.name: simulateInput
tools.description: Simulate keyboard or mouse input in the editor or PIE

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Key name (e.g. W, A, S, D, SpaceBar, LeftMouseButton)

parameters.name: event
parameters.description: Input event: pressed, released, or held (default: pressed)

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Hold duration in seconds (for held event)

tools.name: xrStatus
tools.description: Get the current XR/VR headset and runtime status

tools.name: xrGuardian
tools.description: Get the guardian/play area boundary info

tools.name: xrSetGuardianVisibility
tools.description: Show or hide the guardian boundary

tools.name: xrHandTracking
tools.description: Get hand tracking data (joint positions, gestures)

parameters.name: hand
parameters.description: Which hand: left, right, or both (default: both)

tools.name: xrControllers
tools.description: Get controller tracking data and button states

tools.name: xrPassthrough
tools.description: Get passthrough mode status

tools.name: xrSetPassthrough
tools.description: Enable or disable passthrough mode

tools.name: xrSetDisplayFrequency
tools.description: Set the HMD display refresh rate

tools.name: xrSetPerformanceLevels
tools.description: Set CPU and GPU performance levels for XR

tools.name: xrRecenter
tools.description: Recenter the XR tracking origin

tools.name: storyState
tools.description: Get the current story/narrative state

tools.name: storyAdvance
tools.description: Advance the story to the next beat

tools.name: storyGoto
tools.description: Jump to a specific story beat or chapter

tools.name: storyPlay
tools.description: Play/resume story playback

tools.name: dataTableRead
tools.description: Read rows from a DataTable asset

tools.name: dataTableWrite
tools.description: Write or update rows in a DataTable asset

parameters.name: rows
parameters.description: Array of row objects to write

tools.name: animationPlay
tools.description: Play an animation on an actor's skeletal mesh

tools.name: animationStop
tools.description: Stop animation playback on an actor

tools.name: materialSetParam
tools.description: Set a material parameter on an actor's mesh

tools.name: collisionTrace
tools.description: Perform a line trace / raycast in the scene

tools.name: audioGetStatus
tools.description: Get the audio system status

tools.name: audioListActiveSounds
tools.description: List all currently playing sounds

tools.name: audioGetDeviceInfo
tools.description: Get audio device information

tools.name: audioListSoundClasses
tools.description: List all sound classes and their volumes

tools.name: audioSetVolume
tools.description: Set the volume of a sound class

tools.name: audioGetStats
tools.description: Get audio engine statistics

tools.name: audioPlaySound
tools.description: Play a sound asset at a location

tools.name: audioStopSound
tools.description: Stop a playing sound

tools.name: audioSetListener
tools.description: Set the audio listener position and orientation

tools.name: audioDebugVisualize
tools.description: Toggle audio debug visualization in the viewport

tools.name: niagaraGetStatus
tools.description: Get Niagara particle system status overview

tools.name: niagaraListSystems
tools.description: List all active Niagara systems in the scene

tools.name: niagaraGetSystemInfo
tools.description: Get detailed info about a specific Niagara system

parameters.name: actorName
parameters.description: Actor name with the Niagara component

tools.name: niagaraGetEmitters
tools.description: List emitters in a Niagara system

tools.name: niagaraSetParameter
tools.description: Set a user parameter on a Niagara system

tools.name: niagaraGetParameters
tools.description: Get all user parameters from a Niagara system

tools.name: niagaraActivateSystem
tools.description: Activate or deactivate a Niagara system

tools.name: niagaraSetEmitterEnable
tools.description: Enable or disable a specific emitter in a Niagara system

tools.name: niagaraResetSystem
tools.description: Reset a Niagara system to its initial state

tools.name: niagaraGetStats
tools.description: Get performance statistics for Niagara systems

tools.name: niagaraDebugHUD
tools.description: Toggle Niagara debug HUD overlay

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: Whether to enable the debug HUD

tools.name: pixelStreamingGetStatus
tools.description: Get Pixel Streaming status

tools.name: pixelStreamingStart
tools.description: Start Pixel Streaming

tools.name: pixelStreamingStop
tools.description: Stop Pixel Streaming

tools.name: pixelStreamingListStreamers
tools.description: List active Pixel Streaming streamers

tools.name: pixelStreamingGetCodec
tools.description: Get the current video codec settings

tools.name: pixelStreamingSetCodec
tools.description: Set the video codec for Pixel Streaming

tools.name: pixelStreamingListPlayers
tools.description: List connected Pixel Streaming players

tools.name: renderDocCapture
tools.description: Trigger a RenderDoc frame capture

tools.name: listCVars
tools.description: List console variables, optionally filtered by prefix

parameters.name: prefix
parameters.description: Filter CVars by prefix (e.g. r., sg., t.)
